name: MiniCPM-o 2.6
license: MiniCPM Model License (custom; free for research and, after registration, commercial use) + Apache-2.0 code
archDisplay: SigLip-400M + Whisper-medium-300M + ChatTTS-200M + Qwen2.5-7B, end-to-end omni model
note: 8B any-to-any omni model (vision+speech+language) with real-time streaming, matching GPT-4o-202405 on OpenCompass (70.2 avg).

results.notes: Outperforms GPT-4o-202408 (64.1) on multimodal live-streaming benchmark

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model via HF model card (8B total, SigLip-400M+Whisper-medium-300M+ChatTTS-200M+Qwen2.5-7B, MiniCPM Model License weights / Apache-2.0 code, max_position_embeddings=32768 -> 32k ctx, independently confirmed). Release corroborated: OpenBMB announced via X on Jan 13, 2025 with MarkTechPost/press covering it Jan 14, 2025 (1-day spread reflects announcement-vs-press-coverage timing, not a factual error) -- kept 2025-01-13 as the announcement date. OpenCompass 70.2, OCRBench 897, and StreamingBench 66.0 all confirmed present on the HF model card.
